name: cronache-del-destino
description: Motore GDR narrativo con memoria multilivello e collegamento serverless a Ollama Cloud.

scripts.check: node tests/check-html-script.js && node --check js/memory-manager.js && node --check js/narrative-master.js && node --check js/ollama-cloud.js && node --check 'api/ollama/[action].js' && node --check js/experience-v7.js
